description: Knowledge-cutoff registry for model-specific benchmark runs. A real-world case 'counts' for a model only when its disclosure horizon (min of realWorld.disclosure dates) is strictly after the model's knowledgeCutoff. Cutoffs use the last day of the reported cutoff month (exact, strictly-after gate). Entries with "verified": false are not confirmed against the official vendor model card and the runner prints a warning when they are used. Resolve via run.py --model <id|alias>.

models.name: Claude Opus 4.8
models.source: Anthropic model card (January 2026); self-report via `claude -p` agrees (2026-01, 3/3)

models.name: Claude Opus 4.7
models.source: Self-reported via `claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7` (2026-01, 3/3 consistent, 2026-06-24); confirm against the official model card
